next_steps: Initiate empiric treatment for fungal and tuberculous meningitis (e.g., liposomal amphotericin B and antitubercular therapy)
Perform fungal and mycobacterial CSF cultures and PCR testing
Measure serum ACTH, cortisol, and urinary free cortisol
Perform CSF cytology and flow cytometry for malignancy
Consult neurosurgery for potential biopsy of intracranial lesions or shunting for elevated intracranial pressure
Review history for potential exposure to opportunistic pathogens
Continued monitoring of ICP and optimization of hemodynamic status
